hero.title: Get in Touch
hero.description: Have questions about Invoicemonk? We're here to help. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.

office.title: Office
office.description: Contact us online for the fastest response

responseTime.title: Response Time
responseTime.description: We typically respond within 24 hours during business days.

placeholders.subject: How can we help?
placeholders.message: Tell us more about your inquiry...

errors.firstNameLength: First name must be under 100 characters
errors.lastNameLength: Last name must be under 100 characters
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

toast.successDesc: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

responseTime.question: How quickly will I get a response?
responseTime.answer: We typically respond within 24 hours during business days. For urgent issues, email us directly at hello@invoicemonk.com.

supportChannels.question: What support channels are available?
supportChannels.answer: You can reach us through the contact form on this page, email at hello@invoicemonk.com, or through our live chat. We also have a comprehensive Help Center.

phoneSupport.question: Is there phone support?
phoneSupport.answer: Currently we offer email and chat support. Our team is responsive and knowledgeable, ensuring your questions are answered quickly and thoroughly.
